title: Async work mutates shared global state

files.content:
name: ci
on: [push]
jobs:
  test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - run: echo test

import asyncio

global_counter = 0

async def process(job):
    global global_counter
    await asyncio.create_task(job())
    global_counter += 1
    return global_counter
